name: org.mvcexpress.core
description: Lightweight MVC framework for Unity focusing on performance and ease of use. Includes dependency injection, messaging, and a modular architecture.

samples.description: Minimal setup with one MvcModule. Registration via Unity Inspector drag-drop. Showcases Proxy, Service, Command, and Mediator wired through registry components.
Same score counter built with code-first registration. Demonstrates code-based dependency wiring, command binding, and prefab-based mediator attachment.
Same score counter using attribute-based registration. Demonstrates [Register], [Bind], and [Attach] attributes with a near-empty module class.
